title: Hotbar Restock
description: Hotbar Restock is a simple utility mod that automatically refills your hotbar from your inventory when items run out.
body:
# Hotbar Restock

**Hotbar Restock** is a simple utility mod that automatically refills your hotbar from your inventory when items run out.

It is useful for building, mining, farming, fighting, and any situation where you use many of the same items.

## Features

- Automatically restocks hotbar slots
- Helps while building and mining
- Works with stackable items
- Simple vanilla-friendly utility
- Lightweight and easy to use
